title: Remove Ikku name from third page

requirements.summary: Remove 'Ikku' text from page title in HTML document
acceptanceCriteria: The HTML title tag no longer contains 'Ikku'
The heart emoji and 'Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' text remain intact

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag content from 'Ikku ❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' to '❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz', removing only the 'Ikku' text while preserving the heart emoji and quiz name

requirements.summary: Remove 'Ikku' text from IntroScreen component heading
acceptanceCriteria: The h1 heading in IntroScreen no longer displays 'Ikku'
The heart emoji and 'Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' text remain visible
The layout and styling remain consistent

file_operations.description: Update the h1 heading text from 'Ikku ❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' to '❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz', removing only the 'Ikku' text while preserving the heart emoji, quiz name, and all existing styling classes
